# Illustrations needed

Add the following images to this directory. Until they exist, the
corresponding `<img>` tags render as dashed placeholder boxes
(see `css/main.scss`).

- `header.jpg` — full-bleed header image evoking community trust and
  connection (behind the "scroll down" arrow).
- `placeholder-card.png` — a digital membership card.
- `placeholder-block-party.png` — neighbors sharing a QR code at a
  block party.
- `placeholder-network.png` — cards from different communities
  connected together, showing trust links.
- `placeholder-accountability.png` — a card with a notification about
  a reported message.
- `placeholder-data.png` — anonymized community data being gathered
  into a report.
- `placeholder-privacy.png` — a locked card protected by
  cryptographic keys.
- `placeholder-ownership.png` — several different apps offering
  access to the same open card protocol.
